_header: KNOWN-BAD FIXTURE (P1 capabilities). Disease: capability-scoped law attached on ambient prose, the 'EU AI Act attached to a dentist' class: the word 'AI' in a blog post treated as a real AI product signal (caution.md C-047/C-060 concept applied to uses_ai). This bundle is a management consultancy whose only AI language lives in a blog post (including phrases like 'AI-powered' that WOULD match the product signal if the blog exclusion ever regressed) plus a bare 'AI' mention on a service page. Gate that must hold: facts/capabilities.js deriveCapabilities() must NEVER emit uses_ai present=true here. Exercised on every run by facts/capabilities.test.js (fixture-driven tests). All names and domains are pseudonymous.

pages.title: Why AI matters for retail
pages.text: AI is changing every industry. Artificial intelligence and machine learning are reshaping how retailers forecast demand. AI-powered tools are everywhere, and generative AI is the topic of every boardroom conversation. Powered by AI or not, the winners will be the operators who understand their data.

pages.title: Services
pages.text: We provide management consultancy for retail operators: supply chain reviews, store operations and demand planning. Read our blog about AI. Sign up to our AI insights newsletter.

pages.title: Contact
pages.text: Get in touch with the team to discuss your operations. We respond within two working days.

corpus.footerText: Example Consultancy LLP. All rights reserved.
